summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Erick Sixto Customer Portal - all backend APIs and frontend flows working perfectly with live Notion integration
passed_tests: Full admin login flow (magic link request → mock code → verify → token → protected endpoints)
Admin projects endpoint (returns 5 projects with real Notion data)
Admin billing endpoint (returns invoices with paid/outstanding counts)
Portal dashboard (returns project metrics: 17/23 tasks, $2500 estimated value, 74% progress)
Portal tasks (returns 23 tasks from Notion with status icons, priority badges)
Frontend login page loads with email form
Frontend full login flow (enter admin email → get code → enter code → redirect to dashboard)
Frontend dashboard shows project name, metrics, progress bar, estimated value
Frontend tasks page shows task list with status icons, tags, priority badges
Frontend admin overview accessible with proper navigation
Frontend admin projects shows all 5 projects in table format
Frontend admin billing shows invoice table with status badges
Frontend sidebar navigation with Admin and Portal sections, project selector dropdown
Frontend request form renders with Subject, Type, Priority, Description fields
Logout flow works correctly (sign out button clears session and redirects to login)
